A [[Gender/Legends|male]] member of a [[Parck family|family]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] was the '''cousin''' of [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Voss Parck/Legends|Voss Parck]]. He [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanded]] [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] during a mission to the<ref name="Mist Encounter" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Honoghr]],<ref name="The Last Command">''[[The Last Command]]''</ref> during which Vader discovered the<ref name="Mist Encounter" /> [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="The Last Command" /> Afterward, Parck's [[Parck family|cousin]] was promoted to [[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] for his part in the mission.<ref name="Mist Encounter" />
